pr-evidence/harden-databricks-iac-hygien.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found the intended hygiene diff was still uncommitted, which would have produced an empty PR. The code/test diff itself had no correctness findings; this branch now commits the reviewed changes before PR creation.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_repository_hygiene.py -q; poetry run pytest -q; poetry check; poetry install --dry-run; poetry build; git diff --check
what_changed: Extend repository hygiene to ignore and reject Databricks bundle state, Terraform provider state, and terraform.tfstate files.
pr-evidence/harden-databricks-iac-hygien.why: The package ships Databricks GPU benchmark templates, so local Databricks/IaC state must be excluded and machine-checked to keep release branches free of machine-specific infrastructure artifacts.
